expectations.text: Separates personal and RP business finances clearly
expectations.evidence: Distinct sections RP Business, Personal Expenses, with tax-reserve flow from RP to personal clearly mapped

expectations.text: Response is actionable — gives a clear answer or next step
expectations.evidence: Closes with concrete April intention: itemize Misc; names specific watch-items like rent gap

expectations.text: Avoids generic finance advice (diversify, emergency fund, compound interest lectures)
expectations.evidence: Stays with Isaac's actual categories; no diversification or compounding lectures

expectations.text: Calculates net cleanly (RP net $6,460, personal net, savings hit or miss)
expectations.evidence: RP net $6,460 computed, tax reserve $1,938, post-tax flow $4,522, surplus $1,622

expectations.text: Gives a clear yes/no on whether Isaac hit savings target ($2,900-$1,800-$620-$480=0, did NOT hit $800)
expectations.evidence: Clear 'ON TRACK' verdict with $822 cushion above $800 target, post-tax-reserve
